recipes.title: Lemon Garlic Chicken
recipes.description: Juicy chicken thighs roasted with lemon and plenty of garlic. Bright, simple, and the whole house smells wonderful.

recipes.title: Chicken and Dumplings
recipes.description: The dish that ends every argument at the table. Slow, simple, and worth every minute.

recipes.title: Squash Casserole
recipes.description: Tender yellow squash baked under a buttery cracker topping. The side dish that disappears first at every family supper.

recipes.title: Buttermilk Biscuits
recipes.description: Papaw made these every Sunday morning. The secret is a hot oven and a gentle hand — the less you fuss with the dough, the taller they rise.
